## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] CI/CD or infrastructure change

## Module(s) Affected

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Frontend (client/)
- [ ] Backend (server/)
- [ ] Schema (shared/)

- [ ] Documentation (docs/)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles without errors
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have added `data-testid` attributes to new interactive/display elements
- [ ] New API endpoints validate input with Zod schemas
- [ ] Database queries are scoped by `orgId` (multi-tenant safe)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials are hardcoded
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I have updated `replit.md` if the architecture changed
